meaning: adj.致命的,势不两立的,死一般的,极度的,必定的
examples: Some mushrooms contain a deadly poison.
Life in a small town could be deadly dull.
The coureurs des bois faced deadly rapids, canyons, blizzards, bears, wolves, and marauding Iroquois.
Street gangs in the northern triangle also fight deadly battles often unrelated to the drug trade.
